description: KLC-074 planning-index cut-over baseline. Frozen at cut-over from the LLM-decompose modules.json (.klc/index/modules.json) and the archived-ticket corpus (.klc/tickets/*/meta.json + git history). The gate test rebuilds modules_build over the LIVE repo and asserts the containment invariant per file (see test docstring).
new_module_set_source: modules_build.py all-files directory clustering @ cut-over (41 modules)
